name: Full Name
definition: Complete legal name of a natural person

name: Date of Birth
definition: Date on which a person was born

name: Social Security Number
definition: Government-issued social security or insurance number

name: Device Identifier
definition: Unique hardware or software device identifier

definition: Information about earnings and income sources

name: Employment History
definition: Record of past and current employment
